text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has been feeling off her game
lately, so she asks me to go to a shrine with her.
choice_data_list: I didn't take you as the type to pray for favors.
I didn't take you as the type to pray for favors.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What? No, I'm not here for that. It's not like
praying will miraculously cure me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I should be looking after my health, that's a
given. I'm just tryin' to keep my spirits high.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: See, I'm gonna make a promise to the gods.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A promise that I'll accomplish things with my own
power and without any divine intervention
needed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna promise them that I won't go anywhere
when the going gets tough, and that I'll train
harder than anyone else and come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't turn my back on a promise to the gods,
right?
choice_data_list: Then I promise to help you win, no matter what.
Then I promise to help you win, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get to prayin', then.
Clang, clang! Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you'd better keep your eyes on me up there,
'cause I'm gonna leave all my opponents in the
dust, no matter how tough they are!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Guess this'll have to do. I'm feeling better
already... Huh?
Rustle, rustle...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering what all the ruckus was about...
Figures it'd be you, Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian? What're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nothing. Just some solo training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Anyway, later.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Solo training, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What am I doing, goofin' around when Brian's out
here runnin' and trainin' so hard?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But y'know what? Seeing her has really pulled me
out of my funk! I'm startin' to feel like myself
again! Let's run back home, full speed!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe me meetin' Brian was a little nudge from
above!

Looks like Hishi Amazon is back to her normal,
energetic self!

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meeeow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's just a cat. Aren't you a cute li'l—

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Mrraaow!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, that's my handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Come back here!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... What the heck... You're tellin' me I can't even catch a cat now?

Hishi Amazon's poor health leaves her at the cat's
mercy...
